case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: checked 30-90s metrics/traces; currencyservice latency.p50 +3.3, checkoutservice>currencyservice latency.p99 +1.0; implication: currencyservice latency directly impacting checkoutservice performance
Currencyservice latency and checkoutservice latency are primary issues. Currencyservice workload follows as secondary.
